summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No GitHub mutations planned; merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, and low-signal PR closeout are blocked or disabled. Classified hydrated open PRs independently, without inventing a shared canonical. Five job refs were not present in the compacted preflight item matrix, so they are scoped needs_human for missing live state only.
